_canary_note: RESERVED CANARY — NOT INCLUDED IN DEFAULT BUILDS. This catalog pins fzf 0.55.0, the known-broken-under-Darling-0.1.20260609 version (Go-1.22 TLV / pthread gap). It is intentionally kept so a future Darling release can be tested for the regression: drop this catalog into the catalog-dir alongside fzf.json (or use --canary-fzf flag in a future build script) and confirm whether the 0.55.0 binary now exits 0 with banner output. If it does, the upstream Darling gap is closed and the fzf version pin in fzf.json can be relaxed. The build-mvp-darling-prefix.sh driver skips any catalog with a leading underscore key '_canary_note' present, so this file is inert by default.
version_pin_rationale: fzf 0.55.0 silent failure under Darling 0.1.20260609 is the cross-toolchain coverage marker. Re-fetch + re-sha256 if/when re-running the canary.
